top_signals.title: Traders Cut South Africa Rate-Hike Bets After Iran Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Traders have scaled back bets on additional South African interest-rate hikes after a US-Iran peace deal sent oil prices tumbling, potentially reducing inflationary pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan’s Shipping Industry Awaits Clarifications on Hormuz Reopening
top_signals.summary: Japanese shippers welcomed on Monday the U.S.-Iran peace agreement which will reopen the Strait of Hormuz but are awaiting more details of the deal and clearance of mines before allowing their ships to pass the chokepoint.According to the association…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The mystery of Venezuela’s missing petrodollars
top_signals.summary: Venezuela's oil production is rising, yet its currency is depreciating, inflation is accelerating and foreign exchange remains scarce.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Lobito Railway Receives First Congo Shipment After Flood Repairs
top_signals.summary: Lobito Atlantic Railway received its first copper shipment from the Democratic Republic of Congo since reopening a flood-damaged section of the corridor, restoring traffic on a key export route for central African minerals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Foundation Healthcare Is Said to Plan Filing IPO Prospectus Soon
top_signals.summary: Foundation Healthcare Holdings Pte plans to file its initial public offering prospectus in Singapore in the coming days, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Asian stocks leap, currencies rise as Trump says Hormuz will reopen
